title: Boston Baked Beans
body:
A New England Saturday-night tradition. Original recipe is hearty and quite sweet by modern taste — adjust molasses to your family's preference.

· 1 quart pea beans (navy beans)
· ¾ lb salt pork
· ½ teaspoon mustard
· 1⁄2 tablespoons molasses
· 3 tablespoons sugar
· 1 tablespoon salt
· Boiling water to cover

source.label: Fannie Merritt Farmer · The Boston Cooking-School Cook Book · 1896
source.ref: Fannie Merritt Farmer · The Boston Cooking-School Cook Book · 1896
